queries.question: Show the customers where either the credit card or personal loan rate is 15%.
queries.sql:
SELECT customers.FullName
FROM loans JOIN rates ON loans.interestRateId = rates.id JOIN customers ON customers.Id = loans.customerId
WHERE (loans.loanType = "Credit Card" OR loans.loanType = "Personal Loan") AND rates.interestRate = 15.0
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?fullname WHERE {
  ?loans a :Loans .
  ?rates a :rates .
  ?loans p:hasrates ?rates .
  ?customers a :Customers .
  ?loans p:hascustomers ?customers .
  ?customers p:name ?fullname .
  ?loans p:loanType ?loantype_w .
  ?loans p:loanType ?loantype_w2 .
  ?rates p:interestRate ?interestrate_w .
  FILTER((((STR(?loantype_w) = "Credit Card" || STR(?loantype_w2) = "Personal Loan")) && (STR(?interestrate_w) = "15" || STR(?interestrate_w) = "15.0")))
}

queries.question: Which customers have credit cards and personal loans with a 15% interest rate?
queries.sql:
SELECT customers.FullName
FROM loans JOIN rates ON loans.interestRateId = rates.id JOIN customers ON customers.Id = loans.customerId
WHERE loans.loanType = "Credit Card" OR loans.loanType = "Personal Loan" AND rates.interestRate = 15.0
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?fullname WHERE {
  ?loans a :Loans .
  ?rates a :rates .
  ?loans p:hasrates ?rates .
  ?customers a :Customers .
  ?loans p:hascustomers ?customers .
  ?customers p:name ?fullname .
  ?loans p:loanType ?loantype_w .
  ?loans p:loanType ?loantype_w2 .
  ?rates p:interestRate ?interestrate_w .
  FILTER((STR(?loantype_w) = "Credit Card" || (STR(?loantype_w2) = "Personal Loan" && (STR(?interestrate_w) = "15" || STR(?interestrate_w) = "15.0"))))
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: Which customers have credit cards and personal loans with a 15% interest rate?
ambiguous_dsl.choice_dsl:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
CHOICE attachment {
  high: { SELECT ?fullname WHERE {
  ?loans a :Loans .
  ?rates a :rates .
  ?loans p:hasrates ?rates .
  ?customers a :Customers .
  ?loans p:hascustomers ?customers .
  ?customers p:name ?fullname .
  ?loans p:loanType ?loantype_w .
  ?loans p:loanType ?loantype_w2 .
  ?rates p:interestRate ?interestrate_w .
  FILTER((((STR(?loantype_w) = "Credit Card" || STR(?loantype_w2) = "Personal Loan")) && (STR(?interestrate_w) = "15" || STR(?interestrate_w) = "15.0")))
} }
  low: { SELECT ?fullname WHERE {
  ?loans a :Loans .
  ?rates a :rates .
  ?loans p:hasrates ?rates .
  ?customers a :Customers .
  ?loans p:hascustomers ?customers .
  ?customers p:name ?fullname .
  ?loans p:loanType ?loantype_w .
  ?loans p:loanType ?loantype_w2 .
  ?rates p:interestRate ?interestrate_w .
  FILTER((STR(?loantype_w) = "Credit Card" || (STR(?loantype_w2) = "Personal Loan" && (STR(?interestrate_w) = "15" || STR(?interestrate_w) = "15.0"))))
} }
}
